name: LibreOffice
tagline: Free, open-source MS Office alternative. Works offline.
best_for: Students who need an offline office suite. Opens .docx, .xlsx, .pptx files directly.
steps: Download the installer for your OS (Windows, Mac, or Linux)
Run the installer — it's about 300 MB
Open LibreOffice Writer for Word, Calc for Excel, Impress for PowerPoint
Save files as Microsoft format: File > Save As > choose .docx / .xlsx / .pptx
notes: 100% legal, no piracy. Used by governments worldwide. Looks slightly different from MS Office but functionally similar.
